short_description.value: Dynamic One-For-All (DOFA) is a neural plasticity-inspired multimodal foundation model for Earth Observation, capable of adaptively processing data from diverse sensors and modalities (optical, SAR, hyperspectral, etc.) within a single unified Transformer framework using a dynamic hypernetwork conditioned on spectral wavelength.

pretext_training_type.value: Masked image modeling with distillation loss

pretraining.value: Self-supervised masked image modeling with a dynamic hypernetwork generating patch embedding weights conditioned on spectral wavelength; continual pretraining with distillation from ImageNet-pretrained teacher models.

dataset.value: Curated multimodal dataset (Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, Gaofen-2, NAIP, EnMAP)

sampling.value: Random sampling per modality (initially 10,000 per modality, then 100,000 per modality, then full dataset)

application.value: Land cover/use, climate zone, object detection
